text: For the electrical package we recommend Vantage E&M Engineering Ltd (F-EL-02) at a corrected HK$12,033,000 — the lowest-priced bid carrying no fatal risk flag, sitting just above the historical median (HK$11,850,000) and comfortably inside the band. Kowloon Power Systems Ltd priced HK$13,442,000; its single safety-prosecution conviction is recorded as a warning but is not disqualifying.
